channel.title: system administration on Justin's Musings
channel.description: Recent content in system administration on Justin's Musings

item.title: Securing a Raspberry Pi
item.description: Recently, I have been working on an automated water system. I am working on a proof of concept that would allow me to expand into more and more IoT projects for my house. In order to accomplish this, I am going to be running some services on a Raspberry Pi. Now, I know some of you are saying…. I want to add a firewall and change my network to separate these IoT devices from the rest of my home devices.
